items.title: Google公布Gemma 4號稱最強本地端開放模型
items.summary: Google週四（4/2）以Apache 2.0開源最新版Gemma 4，以Gemini 3為基礎開發，號稱是現今最強大開放本地端AI模型。

items.title: OpenAI買下科技新聞談話節目TBPN
items.summary: OpenAI週四（4/2）宣布，已買下2024年才成立的科技新聞談話節目TBPN，雙方並未公布交易細節，但金融時報（Financial Times，FT）引述消息來源報導，該交易價值數億美元（low hundreds of millions）。

items.title: 寶可夢、魔法風雲會實體紙牌銷售驚人，為何卡牌遊戲難被數位手遊取代？
items.summary: 2025 年第一季，寶可夢公司官網統計頁面揭露，寶可夢卡牌累計生產量超過 750 億張，並在超過 90 個國家 […]

items.title: 蘋果傳高價掃貨 DRAM 鎖供應，壓縮競爭對手空間
items.summary: 根據 wccftech 報導，蘋果傳出正以高價大量採購行動 DRAM，甚至不惜犧牲部分利潤，來確保自身供應穩定 […]

items.title: fix: default gateway.mode to 'local' when unset (#54801) (#60085)
items.summary: fix: default gateway.mode to 'local' when unset (#54801) (#60085) After v2026.3.24 introduced a gateway.mode guard, startup fails on Windows (and other platforms) when the config file exists but doesn't contain an explicit gateway.mode value. This happens after 'openclaw onboard' writes a minimal config without gateway settings. Default to 'local' when the mode is unset, restoring pre-3.24 behavior where the gateway started without requiring an explicit mode. Fixes #54801 Co-authored-by: Brad Groux

items.title: fix: improve WS handshake reliability on slow-startup environments (#…
items.summary: fix: improve WS handshake reliability on slow-startup environments (#60075) * fix: import CHANNEL_IDS from leaf module to avoid TDZ on init (#48832) schema.ts and validation.ts imported CHANNEL_IDS from channels/registry.js, which re-exports from channels/ids.js but also imports plugins/runtime.js. When the bundler resolves this dependency graph, the re-exported CHANNEL_IDS can be undefined at the point config/validation.ts evaluates (temporal dead zone), causing 'CHANNEL_IDS is not iterable' on startup. Fix: import CHANNEL_IDS directly from channels/ids.js (the leaf module with zero heavy dependencies) and normalizeChatChannelId from channels/chat-meta.js. Fixes #48832 * fix: improve WS handshake reliability on slow-startup environments (#48736) On Windows with large dist bundles (46MB/639 files), heavy synchronous module loading blocks the event loop during CLI startup, preventing timely processing of the connect.challenge frame and causing ~80% handshake timeout failures. Changes: - Yield event loop (setImmediate) before starting WS connection in callGateway to let pending I/O drain after heavy module loading - Add OPENCLAW_CONNECT_CHALLENGE_TIMEOUT_MS env var override for client-side connect challenge timeout (server already has OPENCLAW_HANDSHAKE_TIMEOUT_MS) - Include diagnostic timing in challenge timeout error messages (elapsed vs limit) for easier debugging - Add tests for env var override and resolution logic --------- Co-authored-by: Brad Groux

When the bundler resolves this dependency graph, the re-exported CHANNEL_IDS can be undefined at the point config/validation.ts evaluates (temporal dead zone), causing 'CHANNEL_IDS is not iterable' on startup. Fix: import CHANNEL_IDS directly from channels/ids.js (the leaf module with zero heavy dependencies) and normalizeChatChannelId from channels/chat-meta.js. Fixes #48832 Co-authored-by: Brad Groux

items.title: 韓國進口車銷售增 34.6%，特斯拉與比亞迪引領電動車潮流
items.summary: 2026 年 3 月，韓國的進口車銷售量顯著成長，達到 34.6% 的增幅，這項成長主要受到電動車（EV）需求 […]
